title: Taco Dip
instructions:
Sliced black olives, to taste
Mix the refried beans, jalapenos and taco seasoning in a medium bowl. Spread on a platter.
Blend the avocados, lemon juice and fresh salsa. Spread on top of the beans.
Spread the sour cream on the top of the avocado mixture. Add a layer of shredded lettuce, cheddar cheese and jar of salsa. Top with black olives.
Serve with tortilla chips.
